subject: Re: Vanta — SOC 2 Type II audit timeline

messages.subject: Vanta — your SOC 2 Type II readiness review
messages.body:
Hi Nina,

Thank you for being a Vanta customer. Following up on your Type I completion in October — I want to help you plan your path to Type II.

To get Type II, you'll need:
1. A minimum 6-month observation window (you're on track — observation started Oct 15)
2. An auditor engaged before the observation window closes
3. A few controls we flagged as 'partial' in the Type I that need remediation

Based on your Oct 15 start, your earliest possible Type II completion is mid-April 2026. For a June 30 commitment to a customer, that's achievable.

I'd love to schedule a 30-min call to walk through the open controls and auditor options. Are you or Priya available next week?

— Alex Morrison
Customer Success, Vanta

messages.subject: Fwd: Vanta SOC 2 Type II — we need to move on this
messages.body:
Priya, Marcus,

Forwarding from our Vanta CSM. Key takeaway: if we want Type II done by June 30 (which we committed to Meridian), we need to engage an auditor now — the 6-month observation window is already running but auditors book out 2–3 months.

Also flagged: a few 'partial' controls from our Type I that still need remediation. Marcus — I think at least two of these are on the engineering side (access logging, encryption key rotation). Can we get on a call with Alex next week?

— Nina

messages.subject: Re: Fwd: Vanta SOC 2 Type II — we need to move on this
messages.body:
Yes — set up the call with Alex for next week. Marcus and I will both join.

Marcus — let's use this as an opportunity to get the full open controls list. I don't want Meridian asking about this in the SOW call and us not knowing exactly where we stand.

— P
